section.title: NAME
section.p: detachCL - Separated from the main collection of sub-partition partition collection.

section.title: DESCRIPTION
section.p: Separated from the main collection of sub-partition partition collection.

plentry.pd: Sub-partition name (originally a collection of sub-partition name)

section.title: Examples
section.p: Specify the partition separating the child from the primary partition collection.
